sentences.base_language: "I" is the first-person singular pronoun. In Spanish it is "yo".
sentences.target_language: "Yo" es el pronombre de primera persona del singular.

sentences.base_language: "He" and "his" are used for a male person. In Spanish: él, su.
sentences.target_language: "Él" y "su" se usan para referirse a una persona masculina.

sentences.base_language: "We" and "our" refer to a group including yourself. In Spanish: nosotros, nuestro.
sentences.target_language: "Nosotros" y "nuestro" se refieren a un grupo que te incluye.

sentences.base_language: "You are", "I am", "he is" — these are forms of the verb "to be". In Spanish, ser and estar both mean "to be".
sentences.target_language: "Tú eres", "yo soy", "él es" — estas son formas del verbo ser o estar.

sentences.base_language: "To go", "to do", "to make" — these are common action verbs. In Spanish: ir, hacer.
sentences.target_language: "Ir", "hacer" — estos son verbos de acción muy comunes en español.

sentences.base_language: "To have", "to want", "it is" — essential verbs for everyday conversation.
sentences.target_language: "Tener", "querer", "es" — verbos esenciales para la conversación diaria.

sentences.base_language: "Can", "to know", "to think" — verbs for ability and thought. In Spanish: poder, saber, pensar.
sentences.target_language: "Poder", "saber", "pensar" — verbos para expresar capacidad y pensamiento.

sentences.base_language: "To need", "to drink", "to give" — more useful everyday verbs.
sentences.target_language: "Necesitar", "beber", "dar" — más verbos útiles para el día a día.

sentences.base_language: "On" and "on top of" describe position. In Spanish: en, sobre, encima de.
sentences.target_language: "En" y "sobre" describen la posición de algo encima de otra cosa.

sentences.base_language: "To" shows direction or destination, and "sleep" is a basic daily action.
sentences.target_language: "A" indica dirección o destino. "Dormir" es una acción básica del día.

sentences.base_language: "Above", "from", and "below" are prepositions that describe location or origin.
sentences.target_language: "Encima", "de", "debajo" son preposiciones que describen ubicación u origen.

sentences.base_language: "Where", "when", and "which" are question words. In Spanish: dónde, cuándo, cuál.
"And", "or", "but", "because" are connectors that join ideas together.
